strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) with core stack technologies including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Exceptional background in software testing, including TDD, CI/CD, and creating custom testing libraries and courses.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, which is part of the primary stack requirements.
Does not explicitly list the specific testing frameworks requested (Vitest, Jest, Playwright), despite a strong general testing background.
Heavy focus on niche technologies (DLang, Ember.js) in several past roles may require a brief adjustment period to standardizing strictly on the requested modern TS stack.
response.justification: Aisha is a highly experienced software engineer whose background strongly aligns with the core requirements. She possesses deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside rare, highly relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at her current role at re:cinq. Furthermore, her profound commitment to testing (evidenced by her TDD practices at RIDE Capital and development of the Fluent-Asserts library) satisfies the testing requirement conceptually, even if specific tools like Vitest are unlisted. While she lacks explicit Nest.js experience, her extensive architectural knowledge, proficiency in secondary languages like Java, and 15+ years of full-stack delivery make her an outstanding fit.
